title: Video Friday: Figure, 1X Ramp Up Humanoid Robot Production
title_zh: Video Friday: Figure, 1X Ramp Up Humanoid Robot Production
abstract: Video Friday is your weekly selection of awesome robotics videos, collected by your friends at   IEEE Spectrum   robotics. We also post a weekly calendar of upcoming robotics events for the next few months. Please   send us your events   for inclusion.    ICRA 2026 : 1–5 June 2026, VIENNA   RSS 2026 : 13–17 July 2026, SYDNEY   Summer School on Multi-Robot Systems : 29 July–4 August 2026, PRAGUE
abstract_zh: Video Friday is your weekly selection of awesome robotics videos, collected by your friends at IEEE Spectrum robotics.
